assertionResults.title: returns empty requestData when requestMap is empty

assertionResults.title: throws DataIntegrityError when node configuration is invalid

assertionResults.fullName: EdgeResolver non-decision nodes returns the destination id for a single outgoing edge
assertionResults.title: returns the destination id for a single outgoing edge

assertionResults.fullName: EdgeResolver non-decision nodes returns all destination ids for multiple outgoing edges
assertionResults.title: returns all destination ids for multiple outgoing edges

assertionResults.fullName: EdgeResolver non-decision nodes returns empty array when there are no outgoing edges
assertionResults.title: returns empty array when there are no outgoing edges

assertionResults.fullName: EdgeResolver non-decision nodes excludes edges with null destination_node_id
assertionResults.title: excludes edges with null destination_node_id

assertionResults.fullName: EdgeResolver non-decision nodes treats completedNodeId not found in nodes as a non-decision node
assertionResults.title: treats completedNodeId not found in nodes as a non-decision node

assertionResults.fullName: EdgeResolver decision nodes returns destination of matching conditional edge
assertionResults.title: returns destination of matching conditional edge

assertionResults.fullName: EdgeResolver decision nodes falls back to default edge when no condition matches
assertionResults.title: falls back to default edge when no condition matches

assertionResults.fullName: EdgeResolver decision nodes throws StateTransitionError when no condition matches and no default edge
assertionResults.title: throws StateTransitionError when no condition matches and no default edge

assertionResults.fullName: EdgeResolver decision nodes returns all destinations when multiple conditions match
assertionResults.title: returns all destinations when multiple conditions match

assertionResults.title: returns an empty global scope

assertionResults.fullName: ContextManager merge() merges vars into global scope
assertionResults.title: merges vars into global scope

assertionResults.fullName: ContextManager merge() does not mutate the original context object
assertionResults.title: does not mutate the original context object

assertionResults.fullName: ContextManager merge() merges new vars on top of existing global vars
assertionResults.title: merges new vars on top of existing global vars

assertionResults.fullName: ContextManager resolveForNode() returns all global vars
assertionResults.title: returns all global vars

assertionResults.fullName: ContextManager resolveForNode() returns empty object when global is empty
assertionResults.title: returns empty object when global is empty

testResults.name: E:\Mini Project\AWE\DEV\awe-backend\tests\engine\ExecutionEngine.test.ts

assertionResults.fullName: BullMQQueue enqueue() calls queue.add() with the job data and correct options
assertionResults.title: calls queue.add() with the job data and correct options

assertionResults.fullName: BullMQQueue enqueue() sets jobId to instanceId-nodeId for deduplication
assertionResults.title: sets jobId to instanceId-nodeId for deduplication

assertionResults.fullName: BullMQQueue enqueue() sets attempts: 3 and exponential backoff
assertionResults.title: sets attempts: 3 and exponential backoff

assertionResults.fullName: BullMQQueue enqueue() uses the EXECUTION_QUEUE_NAME constant as the queue name
assertionResults.title: uses the EXECUTION_QUEUE_NAME constant as the queue name

assertionResults.fullName: BullMQQueue close() calls queue.close()
assertionResults.title: calls queue.close()
